full_text:
Sima Zhi
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Zhiwas born in Henei. Appointed Governor of Julu. He committed suicide rather than tax his people for bribe money. Sima Zhi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Sima Zhi lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
